name: Health, Wellness & Spa Services
description: Wellness services including massage therapy, spa treatments, hydrotherapy, fitness coaching, and other therapeutic modalities. Requires at least one verified wellness-focused source.

strategy_descriptions.peer_reviewed_medical: Peer-reviewed articles from medical and wellness journals
strategy_descriptions.professional_associations_massage_therap: AMTA, NBCTMB, and other massage therapy professional organizations
strategy_descriptions.wellness_institutes: Global Wellness Institute, spa industry associations
strategy_descriptions.government_health_databases: NIH, CDC, FDA, and government health resources
strategy_descriptions.textbooks_continuing_education: Massage therapy textbooks and certified continuing education
strategy_descriptions.grey_literature_clinical_reports: Clinic reports, spa studies, wellness center publications

claim_types.client_outcomes: Reported client results or satisfaction patterns
claim_types.mechanism_of_action: How a treatment affects the body or mind

replacement_source_strategies.notes: Prefer NIH/CDC and peer-reviewed wellness research for health-related claims

authority_descriptions.PRACTITIONER_EXPERTISE: Direct experience from massage therapists and wellness practitioners
authority_descriptions.CLIENT_OBSERVATION: Observations from client feedback and case experience
authority_descriptions.INDUSTRY_STANDARDS: Accepted best practices in the wellness industry

claim_repositioning.description: Reframe research-backed claims as experience-backed claims for practitioners

replacements.new: In our practice, we've found that...

claim_repositioning.authority_phrase: Based on direct work with hundreds of clients
authority_phrase_examples: Based on our experience with 500+ clients
Drawing on our therapists' collective expertise
From thousands of sessions we've facilitated

notes: Health/wellness content must avoid medical claims that require peer-reviewed sources. When sources fail, repositioning under practitioner expertise is highly credible for wellness content.
